member.summary: The show in viewer attribute class. Used to determinate if the property should be display into the Maker and Checker Changeset Viewer

member.summary: The exclude attribute class. Used to exclude properties from being displayed into the maker and checker operations form using reflection.

member.name: M:Bladex.Garantias.Presentation.Website.Components.Attributes.IsTooltipAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.param: indica si posee tooltip o no.
Indica los atributos del tag IMG representando una imagen para utilizar como icono de ayuda en los tooltips. Ex "src:t.gif", "alt:test", "class:someCssClass".

member.name: P:Bladex.Garantias.Presentation.Website.Components.Attributes.IsTooltipAttribute.IsTooltip
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this instance is tooltip.
member.value: true if this instance is tooltip; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Bladex.Garantias.Presentation.Website.Models.GarantiaBaseModel.TipoGarantiaBladex
member.summary:
Tipo de garantia asignada por bladex cuando no existe clasificacion
Restriccion: TipoGarantiaSuper.Categoria = CategoriaSuper

member.name: P:Bladex.Garantias.Presentation.Website.Models.GarantiaBaseModel.CategoriaSuper
member.summary: Guarda la categoria de la super. es importante ya que toda la logica de campo se rige de este valor.
